problem: What triggers cancer cells to leave primary tumor and colonize new tissue?
mechanism: Photodynamic therapy targeting specific cell receptors
hypothesis: Photodynamic therapy targeting specific cell receptors may resolve What triggers cancer cells to leave primary tumor and colonize new tissue? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Mouse model knockout study with 5 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
